Just submit your application and tell us about yourself, your experience, and your results.

If you are serious about prediction markets and trading, this is your chance to join a strong circle early.

Trading tools, insights, exploiting market inefficiencies, and more:

@HuntHedge 

#Polymarket https://t.co/jK3Ad17aAX

Came across an interesting wallet while browsing traders on Polymarket

https://t.co/hpqhDJuj2d

A few things stand out:

• $92K profit in the past 24h
• Only 37 predictions total
• $235K biggest win

Looking at the closed positions, most of the profits came from NHL game markets, with several large winning trades in a row

The trader seems to focus on a small number of markets but with very large position sizes, which can amplify results quickly when the read is correct

Definitely a wallet worth watching

🚨 Potential Insider Activity Detected Polymarket

Market: Netanyahu out by March 31
Outcome: YES

10 wallets placed $15,571 on YES within 10 hours.
100% of the volume is on the same side.

⚠️ Shared funding source detected
0xf70da978…dbef

Top positions:
• $4,586
• $4,000
• $1,169
• $1,042
• $1,041

Several wallets opened positions at the same time.

Smart money or coordinated trade? 👀

A user on @Polymarket turned $339 into $83,672 by correctly betting on how many times Elon Musk would tweet during the week of March 3-10

The trader purchased 127,000 “Yes” tokens predicting that Musk would post between 340 and 359 tweets that week, paying just $338 for the position

When the prediction resolved in that range, the user closed the trade and cashed out for $83,672

https://t.co/qSmptgiD1S

While exploring wallets on @polymarket I noticed something interesting

Some of the most profitable traders ( DrPufferfish ) don't trade many markets

win rate 50.7% | total wins +$38,105,207 | overall PnL $6,502,001

Instead they focus heavily on just a few events, but size their positions aggressively when they see an opportunity

This wallet is a good example

Sometimes fewer trades = better results

https://t.co/EJpxg9V7MA

I recently created a new wallet on @Polymarket to test a strategy/instruments under real market conditions

The goal was to see how the strategy performs in different markets and with varying liquidity

The results so far have been interesting:

+$87,378 over the past week

This wallet is not publicly available while testing is ongoing.
Prediction markets are very easy to copy once activity becomes visible, so for now I prefer to control the process

I'll share some of the testing results in the coming weeks

I'm also working on creating a small, closed team dedicated to strategy research, market analysis, and prediction market trading

More details coming soon

Good week on @Polymarket!

Over the past 7 days I made +$2000, mainly from trading the https://t.co/2TB6vJiaUd FDV launch markets

These markets are good because they cover different valuation levels ($300M, $400M, $500M)
Sometimes the probabilities between these ranges get out of sync, which creates good trading opportunities

Instead of just betting on the final outcome, the focus is on how the probabilities move between related markets

Still watching how these markets develop as the launch gets closer:

https://t.co/SrI1euMMoT

Polymarket trader 0xa53e, let’s call him the “Peacemaker,” has been betting on a Russia Ukraine ceasefire since joining on Feb 11.

He has spent $99.6K on these bets and is currently down $11.3K.

If a ceasefire happens, the position flips into profit.

https://t.co/PmWwb3gxhE https://t.co/zZa84qgjF5

About an hour ago, an anonymous wallet placed a $25,676 bet that Iran will close the Strait of Hormuz by March 31.

The odds have since jumped to 77%.

Smart timing… or something more?

https://t.co/fBzSx7lMmD https://t.co/bREHYLiMTU

All time on Polymarket: $212,686.60 profit.
Past month: $6,973.29.

Slowly scaling. No rush.

Right now I am actively testing different strategies across all categories. Politics, macro, narratives, black swan events. I am not trading randomly. Most entries are based on onchain data, wallet flows, timing patterns and liquidity behavior.

The edge is rarely in headlines. It is usually in the data before the headline.

I also prefer trading through anonymous wallets. Less noise, less attention, more focus. When size increases, visibility becomes a disadvantage.

Still refining. Still experimenting. Bank under 100k. Risk controlled.

Over time I will start sharing more structured insights for those who think in probabilities, not emotions.

If you are already trading prediction markets seriously, stay close.
More soon...

A brand new wallet “Roeyha2026” was created just 11 hours ago and placed a $50K bet that the U.S. would strike Iran by March 1, 2026.

It’s already sitting on $96.8K in profit.

Lucky timing… or informed conviction?

https://t.co/KDNIzhgwwf https://t.co/m4m5XT3IHW

Roughly 3 hours before @zachxbt publicly named the crypto company linked to insider trading, two freshly created anonymous wallets placed a combined $59.8K bet on #Axiom.

Within only three hours, those two wallets reportedly secured around $109K in profit, fueling speculation that the traders may have had advance knowledge.

Profiting from a prediction about insider trading before the announcement - a striking coincidence.

https://t.co/Jwi273TYMF
https://t.co/FhPoxW7yEs

Trader predictorxyz, suspected by some to have insider knowledge, placed a $65.8K bet that Axiom would be accused of insider trading by @zachxbt while the probability stood at just 13.8%.

The prediction turned out to be correct, and he walked away with a massive $411.4K profit

https://t.co/0wWYnSvZVa

An anonymous trader opened a fresh wallet and placed a $50.7K wager that Axiom would be accused of insider trading by @zachxbt, at a time when the probability was just 15.1%.

The move immediately fueled rumors that he could be acting on privileged information. Other participants began copying the trade, driving Axiom’s odds even above Meteora.

What happened next?

He exited the position shortly after and secured a $39K profit in just 24 hours.

https://t.co/C7DLWeXoKW

New wallet “dfhgdhfthrfhr” just appeared on Polymarket and instantly placed a $180K bet that the U.S. will not strike Iran before March 4, 2026.

Big conviction or insider-level confidence?

https://t.co/yVfCFnqWiE https://t.co/Oe1gBdu84t

Someone created a new Polymarket wallet and spent $5,120 to bet that #Axiom will be accused of insider trading by @zachxbt.

https://t.co/aWaIernlKN https://t.co/eNUdWOtU3J

A newly created Polymarket wallet just placed a $5,891 bet predicting that #Meteora could face insider trading accusations from ZachXBT.

At the same time, the same entity deposited 11,500 USDC on Hyperliquid and opened a 3x leveraged short position on 186,435 MET worth around $33K.

Polymarket wallet: https://t.co/FiFO1VtzEn  
Hyperliquid address: https://t.co/O6POlq8mbs
